hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *__pycache__* ]]; then python -m pytest tests/ -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -5; fi'
bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q "seed.json"; then echo "Warning: Editing seed.json — this is the canonical data source. Confirm this is intentional."; exit 2; fi'
